# Launch

> Launch is a platform where founders discover, launch, and grow AI products. The community votes on products, helping the best rise to the top.

## About

Launch connects innovative makers with engaged audiences. Founders submit products through a launch wizard, the community votes and provides feedback, and top products get discovered by thousands of users.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://trylaunch.ai/): Daily product launches and trending products
- [Products](https://trylaunch.ai/products): Browse all launched products
- [Categories](https://trylaunch.ai/categories): Browse products by category
- [Tags](https://trylaunch.ai/tags): Browse products by technology and topic tags
- [Pricing](https://trylaunch.ai/pricing): Launch plans and pricing
- [FAQ](https://trylaunch.ai/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [About](https://trylaunch.ai/about): About Launch and the founder
- [Success Stories](https://trylaunch.ai/success-stories): Real results from launched products
- [Product Launch Strategy](https://trylaunch.ai/product-launch-strategy): Guide to launching products
- [Advertise](https://trylaunch.ai/advertise): Sponsorship and advertising options

## Features

- **Product Discovery**: Browse and vote on new AI products daily
- **Launch Wizard**: Simple submission process for founders
- **Community Voting**: Democratic product ranking system
- **Categories & Tags**: Organized browsing by category and technology
- **Success Stories**: Real metrics from launched products
- **Launch Pass**: Premium membership with boosted launches and analytics
- **Daily/Weekly/Monthly Archives**: Historical launch data browsable by date
